source_report: Control link (C2) supply chain intelligence for the UAS/drone industry

radio_manufacturers.name: RadioMaster (Shenzhen RadioMaster Co., Ltd)
radio_manufacturers.market_position: Dominant open-source radio maker. TX16S is the de facto standard EdgeTX radio. Largest ELRS hardware ecosystem.

radio_manufacturers.name: Jumper RC (Changzhou)
radio_manufacturers.hq: Changzhou, Jiangsu (distributed via Shenzhen FEETECH RC Model Co.)
radio_manufacturers.market_position: Second-largest open-source radio maker. Strong in budget and mid-range segment.

radio_manufacturers.name: BETAFPV

products.note: Dual SX1280 or dual SX1276 true diversity

radio_manufacturers.market_position: Leading tiny whoop / micro drone ecosystem. Strong ELRS receiver line.

radio_manufacturers.name: Happymodel
radio_manufacturers.market_position: Pioneering ELRS receiver maker. Smallest/lightest ELRS receivers available.

radio_manufacturers.name: Team BlackSheep (TBS)
radio_manufacturers.hq: Hong Kong (Blacksheep Avionics Co Ltd) + Austria (Conceptos Pirker GmbH, St. Anton am Arlberg)
radio_manufacturers.ndaa_note: Hong Kong entity, manufacturing likely China-based. Austrian entity is European commercial arm.
radio_manufacturers.market_position: Invented the modern long-range RC link. Crossfire was the industry standard before ELRS. CRSF protocol widely adopted even by competitors. Declining market share as ELRS grows.
radio_manufacturers.manufacturing: Products designed in Hong Kong/Austria, manufactured via Chinese CM partners. Acquired by Orqa (Croatia) April 2022 for the ImmersionRC product line.
radio_manufacturers.china_dependency: HIGH — manufacturing in China, HQ in Hong Kong SAR

radio_manufacturers.name: ImmersionRC / Orqa
radio_manufacturers.ndaa_note: EU-manufactured. Orqa claims full vertical integration with no Chinese critical components.

products.note: Ultra-low latency link, designed for FPV racing
Flagship OLED goggles, manufactured in Croatia

radio_manufacturers.market_position: Only Western-hemisphere company claiming all drone building blocks manufactured in-house. Orqa acquired ImmersionRC in April 2022 to create EU-based drone powerhouse.
radio_manufacturers.manufacturing: Designed and manufactured in Croatia (Orqa) and Switzerland (legacy ImmersionRC)
radio_manufacturers.china_dependency: LOW — claims full vertical integration in EU
radio_manufacturers.strategic_significance: Potential NDAA-compliant control link alternative. EU defense drone supply chain.

radio_manufacturers.name: FrSky (Shenzhen Juhang Technology)
radio_manufacturers.market_position: Legacy dominant brand, now declining. Lost market share to RadioMaster/ELRS ecosystem. ACCESS protocol lock-in drove users away.

radio_manufacturers.name: FlySky (Shenzhen Flysky Technology)
radio_manufacturers.market_position: Budget entry-level. Lowest price point. Losing ground to ELRS budget radios (RadioMaster Pocket, BETAFPV LiteRadio).

radio_manufacturers.name: SIYI Technology (Shenzhen) Co., Ltd
radio_manufacturers.market_position: Leading Chinese enterprise drone link manufacturer. MK32/MK15 are widely used by commercial drone builders (agriculture, survey, inspection). Qualcomm SoC-based Android GCS.
radio_manufacturers.strategic_note: SIYI products are deeply embedded in ArduPilot/PX4 commercial drone ecosystem. No NDAA-compliant equivalent at comparable price/performance exists.

ukrainian_combat_links.name: ЧДБ (ChDB)
ukrainian_combat_links.note: Non-standard frequency operation. Combat-proven in Ukraine. Custom protocols designed for EW-contested environments.

ukrainian_combat_links.name: AERONETIX
ukrainian_combat_links.note: Ukrainian combat-proven control links. Custom EW-hardened protocols.
